content.text:
@countshelly, 15 Stratton St, London W1J 8LQ

Belgrave Capital is a London-based investment firm focused on public markets. We trade equities with a focus on semiconductors.

Tuesday June 9 — London — Belgrave Management

The cut narrative is breaking. Sticky inflation, firm oil, and bad YoY CPI bases are repricing toward hike risk, not easing. May core CPI prints June 10 — Polymarket centres 2.8% (~52%) and 2.9% (~32%). June FOMC is ~99% no change; the move is the CPI surprise repricing the path.

Markets trade the surprise. A hot print keeps front-end yields up, punishes duration and weak credits, and tightens conditions for levered borrowers. Firm oil plus higher rates compresses margins and multiples simultaneously.

Short duration. Long XLE and BIL; tactical TBT long. Underweight or short weak credit and long-duration growth into the CPI window.
